summaryAm: ትንሽ የጥድ ዛፍ በፍጥነት ለመትልቅ ከመፈለግ ይልቅ ዛሬን መደሰትን የሚማርበት ታሪክ።
moralAm: ዛሬ ያለንን ደስታ ማየት ከነገ መጠበቅ በላይ ልብን ያረጋጋል።

source.name: Hans Christian Andersen tale
source.notes: Public-domain source inspiration only. This is an original child-friendly Amharic adaptation with softened themes for ages 3-6.

pages.textAm: በጫካ ውስጥ ትንሽ የጥድ ዛፍ ይበቅል ነበር። እሱ ግን “ቶሎ ትልቅ ልሁን” ይል ነበር።
pages.textEn: A little fir tree grew in the forest, but he wished to become big quickly.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for The Fir Tree, page 1: በጫካ ውስጥ ትንሽ የጥድ ዛፍ ይበቅል ነበር። እሱ ግን “ቶሎ ትልቅ ልሁን” ይል ነበር።

pages.textAm: ወፎች “ዛሬ ያለውን ፀሐይ ተመልከት” ብለው ዘመሩለት።
pages.textEn: Birds sang to him and told him to notice today’s sunshine.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for The Fir Tree, page 2: ወፎች “ዛሬ ያለውን ፀሐይ ተመልከት” ብለው ዘመሩለት።

pages.textAm: ዛፉ ረጅም ዛፎችን እያየ ራሱን ትንሽ ብሎ አሰበ።
pages.textEn: The tree looked at tall trees and thought he was too small.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for The Fir Tree, page 3: ዛፉ ረጅም ዛፎችን እያየ ራሱን ትንሽ ብሎ አሰበ።

pages.textAm: አንድ ቀን ልጆች በአጠገቡ ተጫወቱ፣ ከጥላውም ተደሰቱ።
pages.textEn: One day children played beside him and enjoyed his shade.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for The Fir Tree, page 4: አንድ ቀን ልጆች በአጠገቡ ተጫወቱ፣ ከጥላውም ተደሰቱ።

pages.textAm: የጥድ ዛፉ “እኔም ዛሬ ደስታ እሰጣለሁ” ብሎ ተረዳ።
pages.textEn: The fir tree understood that he could give joy today too.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for The Fir Tree, page 5: የጥድ ዛፉ “እኔም ዛሬ ደስታ እሰጣለሁ” ብሎ ተረዳ።

pages.textAm: ይህን ሲያስብ በቅጠሎቹ መካከል ትንሽ ሙቀት ተሰማው። ፀሐይን፣ ዝናብን እና ጓደኞቹን በቀስታ ማየት ጀመረ።
pages.textEn: As he thought about this, he felt warmth in his needles and began noticing the sun, rain, and friends around him.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for The Fir Tree, page 6: a small fir tree noticing sunlight, rain drops, and forest friends with quiet gratitude.

pages.textAm: ትንሹ ዛፍ የጠዋት ጤዛ በቅጠሎቹ ላይ ሲያበራ አየ። ወፎቹም “ትንሽ መሆንህ የጠዋትን ብርሃን አያሳንስም” ብለው ዘመሩ።
pages.textEn: The little tree saw morning dew sparkle and heard birds praise the day.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Small fir tree with sparkling morning dew while birds sing nearby.

pages.textAm: ነፋሱ ሲነፍስ ትንሹ ዛፍ በቀስታ ተንቀሳቀሰ። ከትልልቅ ዛፎች ጋር አንድ የጫካ ዘፈን መሆኑን ተሰማው።
pages.textEn: When the wind blew, the little tree felt part of the forest song.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Little fir tree swaying with tall trees in a friendly forest breeze.

pages.textAm: ልጆች በአጠገቡ ትንሽ የቅጠል ቤት ሠሩ። “ይህ ዛፍ በጣም ጥሩ ጥላ አለው” ብለው ተደሰቱ።
pages.textEn: Children built a little leaf house nearby and enjoyed the tree’s shade.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Children building a tiny leaf house in the shade of a small fir tree.

pages.textAm: በዝናብ ቀን ዛፉ ሥሮቹ ውሃ ሲጠጡ ተሰማው። “እድገት በቀስታ ይመጣል” ብሎ ራሱን አጽናና።
pages.textEn: On a rainy day, the tree learned that growth comes slowly.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Small fir tree drinking rain with gentle drops and soft forest colors.

pages.textAm: ከዚያ ቀን በኋላ ዛፉ ረጅም ዛፎችን ሲያይ አይቀናም ነበር። እሱ ዛሬ የሚሰጠውን ጥላ፣ መዓዛ እና ደስታ ይቆጥር ነበር።
pages.textEn: After that, the tree counted the shade, scent, and joy he could give today.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Happy little fir tree among tall trees with children and birds nearby.
